news.title: TestCity launches new recycling campaign
news.summary: The city announced a campaign to improve recycling participation.
news.body: Residents can join workshops and use new neighborhood recycling points.
news.author: City Desk

news.title: Public transport fares updated in TestCity
news.summary: Updated fare system for buses and metro starts next month.
news.body: The municipality introduced discounts for students and seniors.
news.author: Mobility Reporter

news.title: Cultural week opens downtown
news.summary: Music and theatre events start this weekend.
news.body: Several venues will host activities supported by local associations.
news.author: Culture Team
